title: Shiji: The Grand Historian's Self-Account
description: Sima Qian explains why he endured castration rather than death: to complete his father's history and make his name last forever.
introduction: Sima Qian explains why he endured castration rather than death: to complete his father's history and make his name last forever.

translation.original_text: 僕之先人非有剖符丹書之功，文史星曆，近乎卜祝之間。
translation.text: My ancestors had no merit of enfeoffment. They served as scribes of history and astronomy, close to the diviners and prayer-makers.
